title: sparefixd Drain Pump to Fit Hotpoint Washing Machine (Check fits List Below Before Ordering)
features: See description below for full list of models this part fits. The model number is normally found inside the door, below or above the door seal. Quite often the model number plate can also be found on the side or at the rear of the machine. The model number will usually be printed or stamped on to a sticker or plate and will consist of numbers and letters.

For some washing machines the pump will look slightly different. The manufacturer has changed the design. If your pump has a block electrical connection, not metal spades, you will also need the wire adaptor kit. Pop this code in Amazon search B08FXGP4V2
